zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Trenchard Knight of Wolverton於大約1430年出生在英國多瑟特哈明斯特時，他的父親Henry Trenchard32歲，母親Lady Christiana Mohun32歲。他與Eleanor Filiol在英國哈普爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1502年在英國多瑟特享年74歲。

nameMeanings.name: Trenchard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southwestern; of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Old French trenche, a derivative of trenchier ‘to cut, hack, slice’ (compare Trench ) + the suffix -ard, for someone skilled in cutting, perhaps for a swordsman, butcher, or ditch-cutter.

variants.name: Trench
meanings: English and Scottish: from Middle English trench ‘path cut through woods; cutting or ditch’ (Old French trenche, a derivative of trenchier ‘to cut, hack, slice’). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived by a path or ditch, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Trench Lane in Huddington (Worcestershire), Trench in Ellesmere (Shropshire), or The Trench in Hildenborough (Kent). It may perhaps also be a nickname for someone who cut ditches.
Irish (of French origin): habitational name from La Tranche (Poitou).

History: The Trench family that hold the Irish earldom of Clancarty trace their descent from Frederic de la Tranche, who settled in Northumbria from France c. 1575. They became established in Ireland in the 17th century, when Frederick Trench went there and purchased an estate in Galway in 1631.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Trenchard Knight of Wolverton was born about 1430, in Charminster, Dorset, England, his father, Henry Trenchard, was 32 and his mother, Lady Christiana Mohun, was 32. He married Eleanor Filiol in Hampshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1502, in Dorset, England, at the age of 74.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Trenchard Knight of Wolverton(이)가 대략 1430년 영국 도르세트 처민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Trenchard(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Christiana Mohun(은)는 32세였다. 그는 영국 함프실르에서 Eleanor Filiol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1502년 영국 도르세트에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Trenchard Knight of Wolverton родился около 1430 г. в местности чарминстир, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Trenchard было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Christiana Mohun, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Filiol в местности хампшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1502 г. в местности дорсет, Англия в возрасте 74 лет.
